## Summary

What are you adding or changing?

## Resource Checklist

- [ ] The resource is relevant to causal inference, experimentation, quasi-experiments, causal ML, causal discovery, or design diagnostics.
- [ ] The link is canonical and stable.
- [ ] The description is one sentence and explains practical value.
- [ ] Any important caveat is stated.
- [ ] The resource is not already listed.

## Causal Rigor

Which causal question, design issue, assumption, diagnostic, or method does this help with?
